events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail** — the shield grounded at both ends violates the single-point grounding convention shown on the loop drawing (per ISA 5.1 practice), creating a ground-loop risk for signal noise/error. Flagged as installed-defective/non-compliant, medium risk, with corrective actions to lift the field-end shield ground and retest before acceptance.
